===[[Pokémon Puzzle League]]===
[[File:Pokémon Puzzle League Spa Service Intro.png|thumb|200px|Jessie in Pokémon Puzzle League]]
Along with many other ''[[Pokémon the Series]]'' characters, both Jessie and James appeared in {{pkmn|Puzzle League}}, where they appeared with a {{TP|James|Weezing}}, an {{TP|Jessie|Arbok}}, and a {{p|Golbat}}. They are the main opponents in the "Spa Service" line clear challenge.
